message:
fix(fsfs): invalidate vector index for equal-revision content hash changes

Remove the observed_revision > previous_revision guard from the
invalidation filter — when content_hash_changed is true and the
revision is the same (e.g., mtime collision with different content),
the stale vectors must still be invalidated. Adds a regression test
for the equal-revision hash-changed scenario.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
